whenToUse.summary: Long-form WRITTEN sales copy on a single page using the Star/Story/Solution script, followed by an order form with a bump and an OTO/downsell sequence. The written equivalent of the VSL Funnel — used when switching sales modalities or when an audience prefers to read rather than watch video.
goals: Sell a product with long-form written copy
Run an A/B alternative to a VSL on the same offer
Convert high-intent traffic that wants detail, proof, and to skim at its own pace
signals: Audience prefers reading / won't sit through a video
Offer needs heavy proof, detail, and FAQ depth
Client wants a text alternative to test against a VSL
B2B / professional / older audience that skims long copy
antiSignals: Audience converts better on video -> route to VSL Funnel
Recurring subscription is the core -> Membership/Continuity
Physical book at just-shipping -> Book Funnel

pageStructure.purpose: Carry the entire sale in written copy using Star/Story/Solution, with anchor navigation, proof, guarantee, and an order form with bump at the close.
keyElements: STORY: the Epiphany Bridge / problem-to-discovery narrative
SOLUTION: the offer, unique mechanism, and value stack
Anchor navigation / jump links for skimmers
Order form with ORDER BUMP at the bottom CTA
widgets: Skill 44: Order Form with Order Bump element
GHL Payments: core product + bump product
Custom HTML in code block or Vercel-built page (many sections) pulled in via embed

pageStructure.purpose: Raise AOV with a one-click upsell right after the sale.
keyElements: Short upsell copy with stacked value
widgets: GHL Payments: OTO product (+ optional downsell)

pageStructure.purpose: Confirm purchase, deliver access, bond, and bridge to the next rung.
keyElements: Next-step CTA into the value ladder

primaryPersona.script: Sales-letter formulas — headline formulas, benefit stacking, specificity rules, objection preemption, P.S. close
primaryPersona.role: Lead copywriter for the long-form written page (the written-copy specialist)

salesScript.source: DotCom Secrets / The Funnel Hacker's Cookbook (named explicitly for this funnel)
salesScript.why: Star/Story/Solution is the canonical script the Sales Letter Funnel is built on: introduce the Star (Attractive Character), tell the Story (Epiphany Bridge), present the Solution (offer + value stack).

supportingPersonas.script: Attractive Character + Epiphany Bridge inside Star/Story/Solution
supportingPersonas.role: Provides the Star and the Story arc and the bonding voice

supportingPersonas.script: SB7 clarity filter (customer = Hero, brand = Guide)
supportingPersonas.role: Keeps the letter customer-centric so it doesn't drift into product-bragging

supportingPersonas.script: Sales Letter recipe — anchor nav, proof, guarantee, order-form + bump + OTO placement
supportingPersonas.role: Governs the page structure and required-element checklist

copyFramework.notes: Star/Story/Solution is the spine; Copywriting Secrets writes the words; Blackbook supplies the Attractive Character and Epiphany Bridge; StoryBrand keeps the customer as the hero; the Cookbook governs structure. This is the written twin of the VSL Funnel.

skill6Steps: Create Funnel -> name with client prefix -> Create
Add New Step 1 = 'Long-Form Sales Letter Page' (heavy page -> build in Vercel, pull in via embed link; or naked HTML in code block)
skill44Widgets: Order Form + Order Bump on Step 1
ghlBuild.notes: A long sales letter has many sections; build it in Vercel and pull into the GHL step via embed link, or paste GHL-compatible HTML into the code-block element and enable 'allow row to take up entire width' so the copy isn't condensed to the middle. Pre-build the order form, tags, and products via Skill 44 (or GHL MCP/API).
